priority_1_blocking.title: Fix VGG-16-BN Table 3: all numbers wrong
priority_1_blocking.description: Every entry in Table 3 is incorrect when verified against actual epoch_metrics.jsonl. Paper inflates means by 0.04-0.10%. Correct values: constant=91.98+/-0.08, cosine=91.89+/-0.30, CWD=92.02+/-0.27, SWD=92.02+/-0.24, half_lambda=92.06+/-0.13, random_mask=91.96+/-0.36, no_wd=91.96+/-0.09, Phi spread=0.18%. Implement verify_figures.py to prevent future discrepancies.

priority_1_blocking.title: Fix NoBN Table 5: reports seed maxima not means
priority_1_blocking.description: Table 5 constant=87.74 is seed_42 max, not 3-seed mean (actual mean=87.49+/-0.23). CWD=87.64 is also seed_42 max (actual mean=87.46+/-0.19). Gap shrinks from 0.10% to 0.03%.

priority_1_blocking.title: Run rho_high experiment (lambda=5e-3, 4 methods x 3 seeds)
priority_1_blocking.description: The paper's central prediction (method sensitivity increases at high rho) has zero completed experimental data at rho>2.0. Figure 1's 'differentiation' zone is entirely extrapolated. Run ResNet-20/CIFAR-10/AdamW with lambda=5e-3 (rho~5.0), methods: constant, cwd_hard, cosine_schedule, no_wd, 3 seeds, 200 epochs. Use gradient clipping max_norm=5.0. Fallback to lambda=2e-3 (rho~2.0) if unstable.
priority_1_blocking.blocking: Theorem 1 non-trivial prediction; Figure 1 integrity; regime analysis

priority_1_blocking.title: Implement and test PMP-WD
priority_1_blocking.description: PMP-WD = clip(kappa*(rho*-rho_hat_t)+, 0, lambda_max) is ~30 LOC. Run at rho=0.5 (should match constant, validates theory) and rho=5.0 (should outperform constant, validates Theorem 3). Three seeds each. Even a null result validates the theory.
priority_1_blocking.blocking: Theorem 3 as contribution vs. thought experiment

priority_1_blocking.title: Write Appendices B.1 and B.3 (Theorem 1 and Theorem 3 proofs)
priority_1_blocking.description: Four appendices cited but missing (B.1, B.3, B.4, A.3). At minimum B.1 (Theorem 1 full proof) and B.3 (PMP-WD derivation) must exist before submission. A theory paper without proofs is not submittable.

priority_1_blocking.title: Verify '105 completed runs' claim
priority_1_blocking.description: Audit all epoch_metrics.jsonl files across iter_003 and iter_005 for exact epoch counts. Count only runs with 200+ completed epochs. Update the abstract with the verified count. Several incomplete experiments may be inflating the count.

priority_2_high.title: Complete NoBN no_wd (seeds 123 and 456)
priority_2_high.description: NoBN no_wd has only seed_42 complete (200 ep). Seed_123 at 95 epochs, seed_456 missing. Need all 3 seeds to compute NoBN Phi spread (requires at least 3 methods).
priority_2_high.blocking: NoBN Phi spread; Theorem 1 NoBN test

priority_2_high.title: Launch matched-rho SGD no_wd (3 seeds)
priority_2_high.description: Matched-rho SGD currently has constant (2 seeds) and CWD (2 seeds). no_wd is entirely missing. Cannot compute Phi spread without it. Without Phi spread, the SGD/AdamW confound resolution is impossible.

priority_2_high.title: Fix Cohen's d formula label
priority_2_high.description: Still labeled as 'paired formula' but values match unpaired pooled. Flagged in previous critique, uncorrected. Change description to unpaired pooled formula with note about paired t-test for p-values.

priority_2_high.title: Annotate Figure 1 with data coverage
priority_2_high.description: Mark which zones of the three-zone regime diagram have complete data, partial data, or no data. Currently 2/3 zones are extrapolated without acknowledgment in the figure itself.

priority_2_high.title: Cross-validate CSI under SGD
priority_2_high.description: Compute Spearman CSI-accuracy correlation under SGD (data exists in iter_003). If CSI predicts SGD rankings but not AdamW, validates CSI as metric. If CSI fails everywhere, reframe or drop.

priority_2_high.title: Verify rho_low actually achieves rho~0.05
priority_2_high.description: rho_low constant accuracy (90.01+/-0.07) nearly matches standard rho constant (90.13+/-0.31). If effective rho did not change (dominated by gradient norm), the experiment tests the wrong regime. Extract per-layer rho from diagnostics.

priority_2_high.title: Write Appendix B.4 (RG derivation) and A.3 (CSI sensitivity)
priority_2_high.description: Remaining two missing appendices. B.4 supports Remark 3.1 (dual derivation). A.3 supports CSI weight robustness claim in Section 3.2.

priority_3_medium.title: Add n=5 seeds for key methods
priority_3_medium.description: Add seeds 789, 999 for constant/CWD/no_wd on CIFAR-10 AdamW + VGG-16-BN. Raises TOST power from 15% to 55% for delta=0.3%.

priority_3_medium.title: Complete rho_low experiments
priority_3_medium.description: CWD seed_123 at 346/400 epochs, half_lambda seed_42 at 106 epochs. Finish these plus missing seeds.

priority_3_medium.title: Standardize method naming
priority_3_medium.description: Multiple naming variants: cosine_schedule/cosine schedule/Cosine WD, no_wd/no-WD/no weight decay. Standardize throughout.

priority_3_medium.title: Reconcile CWD phi definition (u_t vs g_t)
priority_3_medium.description: CWD uses sign(theta)=sign(u_t) but framework signature uses g_t. Explicitly state which and reconcile.

priority_3_medium.title: ImageNet ResNet-50 experiments
priority_3_medium.description: User-specified requirement. 4 methods x 3 seeds x 90 epochs. Tests scale generalizability.

priority_3_medium.title: SPWD pilot (if compute allows)
priority_3_medium.description: Implement stable rank velocity feedback WD. Novel algorithm (8/10 novelty claimed). Lower priority than PMP-WD.
